ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Continued To Jun-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Jeff Chin to appear on June 16, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Continued To May-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The status hearing on the filing of the Inventory and Appraisal was continued from April 07, 2021, to May 05, 2021, in error. The Status hearing will be continued to May 19, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204, as agreed upon on April 07, 2021.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jeff Chinn, via ZOOM, in propia persona.

At the outset, the court queries Mr. Chin as to why he missed the previous court date. The court advises that a status of inventory was set for JAN-27-2021 and was included in the notes but that notice was insufficient and the order to appear is off calendar. The court queries Mr. Chinn as to the status of the Inventory and Appraisal. Mr. Chinn advises that the person he is working with has been ill and unable to work on the appraisal but she is now better and is currently preparing the Inventory and Appraisal. After additonal discussion, the status hearing on the filing of Inventory and Appraisal is continued to MAY-19-2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Continued To Apr-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Jeff Chinn, in pro per, to appear on APR-07-2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why an Inventory and Appraisal, which needs to be a final Inventory and Appraisal, has not been filed. The status hearing on the filing of the Inventory and Appraisal is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods/Rosie Noguera; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
